docs.text:

这里集中放笔记、云盘和 AI 入口，方便快速直达常用服务。 | A hub for notes, cloud drive, and AI entrypoints.

notes cloud drive ai 浏览内容 | Browse 打开云盘 | Open Drive 打开 AI 站点 | AI Chat 站点说明 | About

这个首页只保留最常用的入口，后续内容会继续按需补充。 | Quick access to the main services, with more content added as needed.

GitHub 源码 | Source Code 内容入口 | Contents

下面是几个常用入口，方便从主页直接跳到云盘、AI 和源码。 | Quick links to the cloud drive, AI, and source code.

Featured · 精选项目 云盘项目 | Cloud Drive

远程文件存储和共享服务，支持大文件上传下载。| Remote file storage and sharing service with large file support.

storage files cloud 快速访问云盘 | Quick Access Featured · 精选项目 AI 对话平台 | AI Chat

基于 LobeChat 的云端 AI 对话平台，支持 56+ 个大语言模型供应商。| LobeChat-based AI chat platform supporting 56+ LLM providers.

ai chat models 进入 AI 站点 | Enter AI Source · 源码库 项目源码 | Repository

open source repository deployment 查看源码 | View Code 浏览人数统计 | Visitors 加载中 更新时间 | Updated 2026-04-05

docs.title: 云盘 / Cloud Drive
docs.text:
Sihan's Blog | 思涵的个人网站 Home | 首页 Drive | 云盘 Features | 功能 GitHub Project / Service | 项目 / 服务 云盘服务 | Cloud Drive

远程文件存储和管理 - 上传、下载、分享文件 | Remote storage - Upload, download & share files

storage upload download cloud 打开云盘 | Open Drive AI 站点 | AI Chat 回到首页 | Back Home 使用说明 | Instructions

文件存储在远程云服务器上，适合大文件和长期保存。上传需要密码保护，下载不需要。| Files stored on remote cloud servers, suitable for large files and long-term storage. Uploads require password, downloads are unrestricted.

打开云盘 | Open AI 站点 | AI GitHub 源码 | Code 界面预览 | Interface Preview

下面直接显示远程文件界面，桌面浏览器会更方便一点。| Cloud drive interface below, works best on desktop browsers.

如果内嵌加载不稳定，可以直接用上面的按钮打开。| If embedded loading is unstable, use the button above to open directly.

功能特性 | Features

云盘服务的主要功能说明。| Main features of the cloud drive service.

Upload | 上传 文件上传 | File Upload

支持大文件上传，上传前需要输入密码进行身份验证。支持单文件 < 10GB 的上传限制。| Supports large file uploads with password verification. Single file upload limit < 10GB.

password protected secure Download | 下载 文件下载 | File Download

下载文件无需密码，任何人都可以下载已上传的文件。支持批量下载和分块下载。| Download files without password, anyone can access uploaded files. Supports batch and resumable downloads.

public access resumable Directory | 目录 目录管理 | Directory Management

支持创建和组织目录，可以按项目或类别保存文件。支持目录压缩下载。| Organize files in directories by project or category. Support for compressed directory downloads.

organization archive Sharing | 分享 文件分享 | File Sharing

可以生成分享链接，与他人共享文件而无需上传权限。支持设置分享链接的过期时间。| Generate share links to share files with others without upload permission. Support for link expiration settings.

collaboration expiring links 浏览人数统计 | Visitors 加载中 更新时间 | Updated 2026-04-05
